summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NAOM Jewels e-commerce app. Backend APIs are fully functional (42/42 tests passed). Frontend functionality is mostly working with one authentication issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form shows validation error 'Please fill out this field' even when fields are filled
ui_bugs.details: Registration works fine, but login flow has form validation issues preventing successful login

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, categories, bestsellers, AI recommendations)
Navigation menu works (Rings, Necklaces, Earrings, Bracelets links)
Products page shows 38 products with working filters
Product detail page displays product info and add to cart button
User registration flow creates new account successfully
Add product to cart functionality works
Cart drawer displays items with correct count
Add product to wishlist functionality works
AI Chat widget opens and accepts messages
Checkout page loads with order summary

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor login issue out of 20+ features tested)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix login form validation issue in AuthModal component. The registration works perfectly, but login shows 'Please fill out this field' validation error even when email and password fields are properly filled.
